name: byspace
description: BySpace: voice-controlled development environment for local AI coding agents

scripts.dev:server:watch: concurrently --kill-others --names protocol,client,server --prefix-colors yellow,blue,cyan "npm run watch:protocol" "npm run watch:client" "npm run dev:server:raw"
scripts.build:client: npm run build:protocol && npm run build --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-client
scripts.build:client:clean: npm run build:protocol:clean && npm run build:clean --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-client
scripts.build:server-deps: npm run build:highlight && npm run build:relay && npm run build:client
scripts.build:server-deps:clean: npm run build:highlight:clean && npm run build:relay:clean && npm run build:client:clean
scripts.build:server: npm run build:server-deps && npm run build --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-server && npm run build --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace
scripts.build:server:clean: npm run build:server-deps:clean && npm run build:clean --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-server && npm run build:clean --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace
scripts.build:app-deps: npm run build:highlight && npm run build:client
scripts.build:app-deps:clean: npm run build:highlight:clean && npm run build:client:clean
scripts.typecheck:server: npm run typecheck --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-relay && npm run typecheck --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-protocol && npm run typecheck --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-client && npm run typecheck --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-server && npm run typecheck --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace
scripts.version: npm run version:sync-internal && npm run release:prepare && git add -A
scripts.release:check: npm run release:prepare && npm run typecheck --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-highlight && npm run typecheck --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-relay && npm run typecheck --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-protocol && npm run build:client:clean && npm run typecheck --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-client && npm run build:server:clean && npm run typecheck --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-server && npm run typecheck --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-highlight && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-relay && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-protocol && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-client && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-server && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace
scripts.release:publish:dry-run: npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-highlight --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-relay --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-protocol --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-client --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-server --access public && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace --access public
scripts.release:publish:beta:dry-run: npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-highlight --access public --tag beta && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-relay --access public --tag beta && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-protocol --access public --tag beta && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-client --access public --tag beta && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-server --access public --tag beta && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace --access public --tag beta
scripts.release:publish: npm publish --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-highlight --access public && npm publish --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-relay --access public && npm publish --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-protocol --access public && npm publish --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-client --access public && npm publish --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-server --access public && npm publish --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace --access public
scripts.release:publish:beta: npm publish --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-highlight --access public --tag beta && npm publish --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-relay --access public --tag beta && npm publish --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-protocol --access public --tag beta && npm publish --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-client --access public --tag beta && npm publish --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace-server --access public --tag beta && npm publish --workspace=@bytetrue/byspace --access public --tag beta
scripts.release:beta:patch: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:patch && npm run release:publish:beta && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:minor: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:minor && npm run release:publish:beta && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:major: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:major && npm run release:publish:beta && npm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:next: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:beta:next && npm run release:publish:beta && npm run release:push
scripts.release:promote: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:promote && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:patch: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:patch && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:minor: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:minor && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
scripts.release:major: npm run release:check && npm run version:all:major && npm run release:publish && npm run release:push
